title: Remove release drafter due to enabled cd
description:
Hello bitbucket-kubernetes-credentials developers! 👋
This is an automated pull request created by the Jenkins Plugin Modernizer tool. The tool has applied the following recipes to modernize the plugin:

    Remove Release Drafter if CD is enabled
    io.jenkins.tools.pluginmodernizer.RemoveReleaseDrafter
    Remove Release Drafter if CD is enabled. See https://www.jenkins.io/doc/developer/publishing/releasing-cd/#configure-release-drafter.

Why is this important?
When the plugin is using continuous delivery, release drafter configuration can be safely removed from the repository since it extends by default _extends: .github.
More information can be found on this Documentation.

title: Ban deprecated javax.servlet classes
description:
Hello webhook-secret-credentials-provider developers! 👋
This is an automated pull request created by the Jenkins Plugin Modernizer tool. The tool has applied the following recipes to modernize the plugin:

    Ensure the pom.xml contains the property `ban-deprecated-stapler.skip` set to `false`
    io.jenkins.tools.pluginmodernizer.BanJavaxServletClasses
    Ensure the pom.xml contains the property `ban-deprecated-stapler.skip` set to `false`.

Why is this important?
The javax.servlet API is deprecated in Jenkins plugins.
Ensure to update the pom.xml with <ban-deprecated-stapler.skip>false</ban-deprecated-stapler.skip> to prevent regressions.
